title: Os' Emeralds to Opals (Regular/Shimmering/Emissive)
description: This pack changes the Minecraft Emerald to an Opal. There is a regular, static version available, as well as a shimmering version, and an emissive+shimmering version available.
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis) # What Does This Pack Do? This pack changes the Minecraft Emerald to an Opal! Pair this pack with [![Os' Shimmering Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/os-shimmering-ores/versions)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/os-shimmering-ores/versions) to have a full set of emissive/shimmering ore blocks! There are 3 versions of this pack available: - Regular - Shimmering (animated) - Shimmering (animated) & emissive *(Optifine/Equivalent required)* ![Optifine required for the emissive version](https://i.imgur.com/YYnx5ma.png)
*Please note that the emissive version REQUIRES Optifine or an Optifine equivalent to work.* First image is of the non-emissive version, the second shows the emissive effect in the dark. ![Picture of all the textures included in this pack](https://i.imgur.com/B6zedAx.png) ![Picture of all the textures included in this pack](https://i.imgur.com/oaYKnBI.png) [![Join our public server](https://i.ibb.co/6JJPnwb/ezgif-com-gif-maker-2.gif)](https://osland.store.playerlands.com/) [![Get 25% off your first month with BisectHosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a68298ac-ecfb-4f1b-9057-5081d638948d.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis) # Usage Rights Using/modifying for personal use is allowed. Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to this page. Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute. Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures. # Social and Donation Links [![Join me on Discord](https://i.imgur.com/csRbGBw.png)](https://discord.gg/5fEusZCj72) [![Donate via PayPal](https://i.imgur.com/lGhDSBX.png)](https://www.paypal.me/emilybaucom94) [![Visit my Planet Minecraft page](https://i.imgur.com/zG48U4s.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/oslypsis/) [![Donate to The Trevor Project](https://i.imgur.com/0TpyVd4.png)](https://give.thetrevorproject.org/give/63307/#!/donation/checkout) [![Advertise here](https://i.imgur.com/zqkNdbZ.png)](https://emilybau.com) [![Click here to request a logo design of your own](https://i.imgur.com/AAMQcsI.png)](https://emilybau.com)
